svg.title: Autonomous AI Company Operating System — Full Architecture
svg.desc: Multi-agent architecture showing CEO, CTO, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, Finance, and Support agents organized around a central orchestration layer with memory, decision engine, and feedback loops.
svg.text: External world — customers · markets · APIs · competitors · regulators

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the CEO agent role and how it makes strategic decisions')
sendPrompt('How does the CTO agent manage the engineering roadmap?')
sendPrompt('What financial decisions does the CFO agent automate?')
sendPrompt('How does the CMO agent run marketing campaigns?')
sendPrompt('How does the orchestration hub coordinate all agents?')
g.text: Task router · priority queue · inter-agent message bus · conflict resolver · human escalation gate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through how Engineering agents write, test and deploy code')
sendPrompt('How do Sales agents handle lead gen, qualification, and closing?')
sendPrompt('What does the Marketing agent automate in the growth funnel?')
sendPrompt('How does the Support agent handle tickets, escalations and CSAT?')
sendPrompt('How does the vector database store and retrieve agent memory?')
sendPrompt('What structured data lives in the relational store?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the shared context store?')
sendPrompt('How does the knowledge graph connect company entities?')
sendPrompt('How does the decision engine prioritise tasks and allocate resources?')
g.text: Real-time KPIs · forecasting · task prioritisation · resource allocation · strategic planning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When does the system escalate to humans and what are the override mechanisms?')
sendPrompt('What cloud infrastructure powers each microservice?')
sendPrompt('How are microservices containerised and orchestrated?')
sendPrompt('How does the message queue handle async agent communication?')
sendPrompt('How does CI/CD work in the autonomous engineering pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What observability stack monitors all agents?')
sendPrompt('How does the self-improvement loop work? Walk me through the reinforcement cycle')
g.text: Outcome logging → failure analysis → fine-tuning queue → A/B evaluation → model promotion → redeploy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What exactly is in Phase 1 MVP? Give me a concrete sprint plan')
sendPrompt('What does the Growth phase add on top of the MVP?')
sendPrompt('What does full autonomy look like in Phase 3? What humans remain?')
